project_identity.name: EuroKredit
project_identity.description: European premium money lending company. An Awwwards Site-of-the-Day level marketing hybrid experience.
project_identity.emotional_archetype: Luxury (Premium, Depth, Mystery) combined with Swiss & High-Contrast (Authority, Clarity).
project_identity.vibe: Luxury-goods monochrome editorial. Reads more like a high-end fashion brand than a traditional bank. Elevated, non-technical, atmospheric.
project_identity.language: French (Ensure all final UI copy is strictly in French)

headings.style: font-serif, highly legible, elegant, and expressive.
headings.sizes: Fluid scales up to text-6xl for H1 (Do not exceed text-6xl blindly, use clamp or sm/md/lg breaks). H2: text-4xl.

body.style: Clean, geometric sans-serif to ground the elegant serifs.

accents.style: uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs to text-sm for sub-labels and manifestos.

colors.rules: No generic bank blues. No full-screen gradients. Apply the 'Tinted Grey' Rule: Never use pure black/gray without subtle warmth or coolness. Use 1px delicate borders in border-white/10 to separate dark surfaces.

visual_enhancers.textures: MANDATORY: Add a subtle noise/grain overlay across the entire app to kill digital flatness. Makes dark backgrounds feel like velvet.
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Glassmorphism with optical clarity (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60, border-white/10). Never use muddy gray transparency.
visual_enhancers.photography: Editorial style. Treat images with large crop-ins, deliberate spotlights, and clipped frames. High contrast and deep shadows.

layouts.global_spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use py-24 to py-32 for section padding. Container padding px-6 md:px-12.
layouts.hero: Full height (min-h-screen). Asymmetric layout. Heavy focus on the kinetic text reveal and masked images.
layouts.bento_grids: For loan types (Personnel, Immobilier, etc.), use MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID. Asymmetry, gap-8 to gap-12. Overlap elements. Break perfectly symmetrical grids.
layouts.manifesto: Numbered editorial chapters ('Notre approche', 'Notre méthode'). Vertical scroll progression with large numbers (font-serif, text-6xl, opacity-20) anchored in the background.
layouts.marquee: Slow editorial drift (react-fast-marquee). Use text-sm or text-base tracking-[0.2em] font-serif. Pale background with dark text or dark background with muted text.
layouts.alignment: Avoid center-alignment for body and generic layouts. Prefer left-aligned typography to enhance editorial flow and readability.

components.hero_kinetic: Masked line-by-line reveal on load. Use framer-motion to stagger letters/words (0.02 - 0.05s).
components.loan_types_grid: Bento/Tetris grid of loan options. Hover states: slight lift, delicate shadow, border lightens.
components.simulator: Interactive loan calculator (Shadcn sliders customized). Must not look like a sterile form. Add grain and solid typography. Output numbers should spin/animate on change.
components.faq_accordion: Shadcn Accordion, customized with bottom borders, large hit areas, elegant custom plus/minus SVG icons.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form/Input. Strip default Vercel-look. Apply minimalist lines (border-b only) or very sharp, low-radius boxed inputs.
components.footer: Massive space (py-32). Dark background. Huge responsive text (e.g., text-[10vw]) CTA at the bottom.

patterns: Kinetic Text Reveal: Split characters/words, mask from y: 50, rotateX: -90 or use width 0% -> 100%.
Scroll Reveals: whileInView={ opacity: 1, y: 0 } with viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}.
Micro-interactions: Hover on buttons creates a sweep or color block shift, scaled up elements.

3d_and_media.strategy: Subtle Parallax or 3D hero moment. Since it's a luxury site, a subtle React Spring Parallax effect layering typography over clipped editorial photography creates deep immersion without heavy 3D mesh overhead.
3d_and_media.fallback: Framer Motion 3D for subtle tilt/rotation of cards.

image_urls.description: Golden cracks on a black background resembling kintsugi art. Perfect for masking inside the kinetic hero text or behind the loan simulator.
Elegant couple enjoying wine in a luxurious private jet. Use in the 'Notre méthode' or manifesto section, clipped in an asymmetric frame with a spotlight overlay.
Woman in black sleeveless dress standing beside a white car. Perfect for the 'Prêt Auto' card.
Beautiful view of a historic building in Bucharest, Romania. Use for 'Prêt Immobilier' card or 'Notre approche' section.
Geometric gold starburst on dark background. Good for section dividers or subtle parallax backgrounds.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for standard text against #0A0A0A. Use text-shadow if placing text over images.
accessibility.aria: Include aria-hidden='true' for purely decorative animations or background text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='loan-simulator-slider', data-testid='nav-apply-button').
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion in all framer-motion variants.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: NEVER create a generic 'AI slop' layout. Break the grid. Overlap images. Use massive typography contrasting with tiny tracking-[0.2em] labels.
Avoid centered text alignments everywhere unless completely intentional for a specific artistic reason. Left-align for flow and elegance.
Add a subtle grain/noise overlay (`pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-difference`) to the main layout for a premium texture.
Install and setup `@studio-freight/lenis` in the main App wrapper for momentum scrolling.
Install `framer-motion` and `lucide-react`. Use `react-fast-marquee` for the editorial scroll.
DO NOT use a completely transparent header. Use Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) so navigation links are legible over imagery.
NEVER use generic placeholder images (no dummyimage.com or placehold.it).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
Ensure the hero kinetic reveal uses character or word-level staggering (via Framer Motion).
